findings.evidence: `rg` shows each new lemma body is exactly the existing lemma: lines 219-227 prove `isJHolomorphicAt_id_fun` by `isJHolomorphicAt_id J x`, lines 247-255 by `isJHolomorphicWithinAt_id J s x`, lines 265-273 by `isJHolomorphicOn_id J s`, and lines 317-324 by `isJHolomorphic_id J`.
findings.fix: Delete the four `_id_fun` declarations and use the existing `_id` lemmas directly; if eta-expanded simp behavior is needed, change the existing lemma statements/attributes rather than adding parallel wrappers.
findings.issue: `isJHolomorphicAt_id_fun`, `isJHolomorphicWithinAt_id_fun` (line 253), `isJHolomorphicOn_id_fun` (line 271), and `isJHolomorphic_id_fun` (line 322) duplicate the existing `isJHolomorphicAt_id`, `isJHolomorphicWithinAt_id`, `isJHolomorphicOn_id`, and `isJHolomorphic_id` lemmas up to unfolding `id`.

summary: The PR adds eta-expanded identity lemmas that are direct definitional duplicates of existing public identity lemmas. No other duplication issue from this angle clears the materiality bar.
